name: UltraTech Cement Limited
summary: UltraTech Cement Limited is the largest manufacturer of cement and ready-mix concrete in India, with a consolidated capacity of over 100 million tonnes per annum. The company manufactures and markets Ordinary Portland Cement, Portland Pozzolana Cement, Portland Blastfurnace Slag Cement, white cement, and ready-mix concrete, catering to diverse construction needs. Its headquarters are located in Mumbai, India.
